prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-COLLAPSIBLESTOOL-BLK Product Type: STOOL_SEATING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Portable Telescoping Collapsible Stool with Carry Handle Outdoor Camping Gear, Black (17.75 Inch Fully Extended) Description: The perfect solution for on the go seating: meet the ASR Outdoor Portable and Collapsible Stool. Take a seat anywhere with this handy telescoping stool, designed for convenience, durability and comfort on the go. Whether you're camping, fishing, attending outdoor events, gold panning and more, this collapsible stool allows you to take a load off wherever you need it.

The telescoping stool easily expands and folds down for quick and effortless set up. The stool features a ten inch seat diameter, adjustable height and reaches 17.75 inches tall when fully extended. In addition, the collapsible stool features a storage safety lock to ensure the stool stays securely locked during use, providing stability and safety across various surfaces.

When fully collapsed, the collapsible stool measures 2.75 inches tall, packing down to easily fit in bags, car trunks, under seats and more. The convenient carrying handle and strap allow for easy portability whether on your person, attached to a backpack or in a vehicle.

Perfect for outdoor adventures, sporting events, or just everyday convenience, this collapsible stool ensures you always have a comfortable place to sit, anywhere, anytime!

Note: Stool supports a maximum of 275lbs when properly locked Search Terms: Collapsible stool; outdoor backpacking fishing hiking gear; camping essentials; travel; gardening tools; bbq; tailgating; telescoping stool; road trip; car RV accessories; garage organization; campfire accessories; picnic; sporting goods; folding chair Features: - COLLAPSIBLE STOOL: Perfect solution for on the go seating whether for camping, fishing, gold panning, attending outdoor events, picnics, tailgating and more; telescoping stool features a ten inch seat diameter, adjustable height and reaches 17.75 inches tall when fully extended - EASY TO USE: The telescoping stool easily expands and folds down for quick and effortless set up, providing instant relief wherever and whenever you need it; non slip, stable and secure on various surfaces - PORTABLE STOOL: Convenient carrying handle and strap allow for easy portability whether on your person, in a bag or backpack or in a vehicle; when fully collapsed, the collapsible stool measures 2.75 inches tall for compact storage; lightweight and easy to carry - SAFETY LOCK: The collapsible stool features a storage safety lock to ensure the stool stays securely locked during use, providing stability and safety; telescoping stool supports up to 275lbs when locked properly - SPECIFICATIONS: Weight: 2.26lbs; Extended Dimensions: 17.75 inches; Collapsed Dimensions: 10 x 10 x 2.75 inches; Color: Black === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 17.75" Black Collapsible Telescoping Stool

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 17.75-in Black Telescoping Collapsible Stool

anthropic.title_differentiation: Portable With Carry Handle, 275Lb Weight Capacity, Safety Lock, Folds To 275 Inches, 10 Inch Seat

openai.title_differentiation: Safety Lock, 275 Lb Capacity, Carry Handle, Compact 275 Inch Folded, Portable Camping Fishing Seating
